prompt: { "type": "event poster", "theme": "Japanese summer fireworks festival", "visuals": { "background": "night sky filled with massive, colorful fireworks in gold, pink, blue, and purple", "midground": "river reflecting the fireworks, distant mountains, an arched bridge, and glowing city lights along the banks", "foreground": "crowd of spectators sitting on the grassy riverbank, some wearing traditional yukata, illuminated by warm lanterns on the right" }, "typography_and_layout": { "top_left": { "catchphrase": "{argument name=\"catchphrase\" default=\"夏の夜、想いが咲く。\"}", "title": "{argument name=\"festival name\" default=\"碧川市 清流花火大会\"}", "subtitle": "—— 碧き流れに、光の華ひらく ——" }, "mid_left": { "date_time": "{argument name=\"event date\" default=\"2026 8.15\"} (土) 19:30〜20:30 (予定)", "venue": "会場：{argument name=\"venue\" default=\"碧川（あおがわせ）河畔 清流大橋周辺\"}" }, "bottom_left_box": { "style": "decorative vintage border", "content": "{argument name=\"highlights\" default=\"約10,000発 音楽とシンクロする 華やかな花火\"} 尺玉・スターマイン 水中花火 ほか" }, "footer": { "style": "dark blue banner at the bottom", "section_count": 3, "sections": [ { "icon": "train", "title": "アクセス", "details": "walking distance and shuttle bus info" }, { "icon": "paper lantern", "title": "観覧のお願い", "details": "3 bullet points about trash, seating, and no drones" }, { "element": "QR code", "text": "最新情報は公式サイトでご確認ください" } ], "bottom_edge": "organizer and contact info with dummy phone number" } } }
translatedPrompt: { "type": "event poster", "theme": "Japanese summer fireworks festival", "visuals": { "background": "night sky filled with massive, colorful fireworks in gold, pink, blue, and purple", "midground": "river reflecting the fireworks, distant mountains, an arched bridge, and glowing city lights along the banks", "foreground": "crowd of spectators sitting on the grassy riverbank, some wearing traditional yukata, illuminated by warm lanterns on the right" }, "typography_and_layout": { "top_left": { "catchphrase": "{argument name=\"catchphrase\" default=\"夏の夜、想いが咲く。\"}", "title": "{argument name=\"festival name\" default=\"碧川市 清流花火大会\"}", "subtitle": "—— 碧き流れに、光の華ひらく ——" }, "mid_left": { "date_time": "{argument name=\"event date\" default=\"2026 8.15\"} (土) 19:30〜20:30 (予定)", "venue": "会場：{argument name=\"venue\" default=\"碧川（あおがわせ）河畔 清流大橋周辺\"}" }, "bottom_left_box": { "style": "decorative vintage border", "content": "{argument name=\"highlights\" default=\"約10,000発 音楽とシンクロする 華やかな花火\"} 尺玉・スターマイン 水中花火 ほか" }, "footer": { "style": "dark blue banner at the bottom", "section_count": 3, "sections": [ { "icon": "train", "title": "アクセス", "details": "walking distance and shuttle bus info" }, { "icon": "paper lantern", "title": "観覧のお願い", "details": "3 bullet points about trash, seating, and no drones" }, { "element": "QR code", "text": "最新情報は公式サイトでご確認ください" } ], "bottom_edge": "organizer and contact info with dummy phone number" } } }

breakdown.creativeCore: Japanese Fireworks Festival Poster：Generates a realistic Japanese summer fireworks festival poster with customizable text, dates, and event details.
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 节日海报、城市印象、传统文化视觉、地域品牌

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, vintage]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
